examples: A sordid, sentimental plot unwinds, with an inevitable mawkish ending.
For sentimental reasons I wanted to delay my departure until June 1980.
This ring has great sentimental value for me.
Kanaan was a sentimental favorite after several near-misses in his 11 previous Indy 500s.
He had ruled out a move to the new Lotus F1 team for sentimental reasons alone.
